description: Routine creative-to-technical handoff. Single message stating a concrete production rule. Should produce one promoted claim.

messages.text: For the Mickey 100th anniversary mug line, all artwork files must be delivered to the factory at 300 DPI minimum. Anything below 300 will be rejected at sampling.

claims.summary: Mickey 100th anniversary mug artwork files must be delivered at 300 DPI minimum
claims.exactQuote: all artwork files must be delivered to the factory at 300 DPI minimum
